final:
// // This comment suggests the ADC saturates at 0 instead of 65535
module adc_16bit (
    input [15:0] adc_input,
    output reg [3:0] quantized_output
);

    always @(*) begin
        if (adc_input >= 16'hFFFF) begin
            quantized_output = 4'b1111; // Max output level
        end else begin
            quantized_output = adc_input[15:12]; // Taking the top 4 bits as quantization
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment suggests the ADC saturates at 0 instead of 65535
